title: 🏷️ PRICE
data_structure:
```json
[
    {
        name: 'price',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 59990,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'price_year',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 2020,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'currency_code',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'EUR',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'isValidCurrencyCode'],
    },
    {
        name: 'country_code',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'DE',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'isValidCountryCode'],
    },
]
```
